message:
refactor(tailscale): Disable Unix socket support pending dependency review

Replace the LocalApiClient::with_socket() implementation with an
explicit error indicating Unix socket support is not enabled:

- Remove reqwest client instantiation for socket communication
- Return TailscaleError explaining feature is disabled
- Mark socket_path parameter as unused with underscore prefix

This change addresses the fact that Unix socket support requires
additional dependencies (likely tokio-uds or similar) that are not
currently included in the build. Rather than silently failing or
producing confusing errors at runtime, the function now fails fast
with a clear message.

Unix socket support can be re-enabled when the appropriate
dependencies are added and the feature is properly tested.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
